title: Dutchie Menu Scraper Input
description: Configure the scraper to extract dispensary product menus from Dutchie.com.

startUrls.title: Dispensary URLs
startUrls.description: List of Dutchie dispensary page URLs to scrape (e.g., https://dutchie.com/dispensary/example-store).
startUrls.sectionDescription: Add one or more Dutchie dispensary URLs to scrape their full product menus.

maxProducts.title: Max Products Per Store
maxProducts.description: Maximum number of products to extract per dispensary. Set to 0 for unlimited.
maxProducts.sectionDescription: Control how many products to fetch and the page size for API requests.

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: Number of products to fetch per API request (max 50).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Select proxies to use for requests.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Configure proxy rotation. Residential proxies are recommended for reliability.
